_comment: Canonical single source for the OpenUPM scoped registry, PINNED comparison-benchmark package versions, required Unity built-in module packages, and package-specific asmdef define symbols. Consumed by scripts/unity/run-ci-tests.ps1 (ephemeral manifest, comparison legs only via -IncludeComparisons) and the committed .unity-test-project/Packages/manifest.json (local parity). Bump versions/modules/defines HERE only and keep both consumers in sync. See .llm/skills/testing/comparison-parity-and-package-single-source.md.
